mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.member_id AS memberId, o.store_id AS storeId, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.pickup_code AS pickupCode, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.updated_at AS updatedAt, s.name AS storeName, s.category AS category FROM orders o JOIN stores s ON s.id = o.store_id WHERE o.pickup_code = #{pickupCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE pickup_code = #{pickupCode}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM items WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET stock = #{stock}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (member_id, store_id, order_status, total_price, pickup_code, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{storeId}, #{orderStatus}, #{totalPrice}, #{pickupCode}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, item_id, quantity, order_price, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.orderPrice}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS order_id, s.name AS store_name, o.created_at, o.total_price, oi.item_id, i.name AS item_name, oi.quantity, oi.order_price, i.thumbnail_url, CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reviewed FROM orders o JOIN stores s ON s.id = o.store_id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN items i ON i.id = oi.item_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_status = 'PICKUP_COMPLETED' ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'PAYMENT_PENDING' AND created_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE)
mapper.update: UPDATE items i JOIN order_items oi ON i.id = oi.item_id SET i.stock = i.stock + oi.quantity, i.updated_at = NOW() WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.pickup_code, o.total_price, COUNT(oi.id) AS item_count, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(i.name, ' ×', oi.quantity) ORDER BY oi.id ASC SEPARATOR ' / ' ) AS item_summary FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN items i ON i.id = oi.item_id WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_status = 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED' GROUP BY o.id, o.pickup_code, o.total_price, o.created_at ORDER BY o.created_at ASC
